pages.text: The $(flesh)Essence Extractor$() draws a creature's $(flesh)Essence$() — a sample of what it $(italic)is$() — without killing it. That sample is what lets biomancy build things keyed to a specific kind of mob.
pages.title: Essence & the Extractor

pages.text: The $(flesh)Essence Extractor$() is grown in the Bio-Forge. Used on a mob it yields that mob's Essence; used on yourself it extracts your own. Unique creatures yield a marked $(italic)Unique$() Essence that carries their individual genetic sequence.

$(bold)What Essence is for.$() Its chief use is the keyed $(l:6_flesh/membranes)Biometric Membrane$() — a membrane tuned to let only one species (or one unique individual) pass. Extract the Essence, combine it with a blank Biometric Membrane, and you have a gate that knows its guest.
pages.title: Keying the World
